title: GM2 leading oil momentum
description: Global liquidity growth aligned with later oil-price momentum.
plainLanguageSummary: Global liquidity growth aligned with later oil-price momentum.
howToRead: Compare direction, turning points, and sustained divergences. Use the tooltip for exact values and observation dates; visual alignment alone does not establish causation.

calculation.formula: Oil_YoY[t] compared with GM2_YoY[t-lag]. Positive lag means GM2 leads oil.
calculation.explanation: The simple-correlation peak is descriptive; lag 5 remains locked from rolling validation.
calculation.example: A value at date t uses only observations dated t or earlier unless the chart explicitly labels a visual shift.

patternsToWatch: Turning points or divergences that repeat across historical episodes
limitations: The simple-correlation peak is descriptive; lag 5 remains locked from rolling validation.

methodology.formula: Oil_YoY[t] compared with GM2_YoY[t-lag]. Positive lag means GM2 leads oil.
methodology.notes: The simple-correlation peak is descriptive; lag 5 remains locked from rolling validation.
